title: Parameter sweeps
description: Sliders step through frames the agent precomputed. No code runs; nothing calls back into the agent.

blocks.text:
## Parameter sweeps

Drag each slider. Every frame was computed up front and shipped as plain rows.

blocks.title: Clustering as k varies
blocks.description: Same points, relabelled per k. (kind: scatter + sweep)

blocks.title: Surface deforming with temperature
blocks.description: A 3D sweep — react reuses the WebGL context. (kind: surface + sweep)
